text_original: 屯，元亨，利貞。勿用有攸往，利建侯。
text_normalized: 屯，元亨，利貞。勿用有攸往，利建侯。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=Judgment.

text_original: 初九，磐桓，利居貞，利建侯。
text_normalized: 初九，磐桓，利居貞，利建侯。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=first.

text_original: 六二，屯如邅如，乘馬班如，匪寇婚媾，女子貞不字，十年乃字。
text_normalized: 六二，屯如邅如，乘馬班如，匪寇婚媾，女子貞不字，十年乃字。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=second.

text_original: 六三，即鹿无虞，惟入于林中，君子幾不如舍，往吝。
text_normalized: 六三，即鹿无虞，惟入于林中，君子幾不如舍，往吝。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=third.

text_original: 六四，乘馬班如，求婚媾，往，吉无不利。
text_normalized: 六四，乘馬班如，求婚媾，往，吉无不利。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=fourth.

text_original: 九五，屯其膏；小貞吉，大貞凶。
text_normalized: 九五，屯其膏；小貞吉，大貞凶。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=fifth.

text_original: 上六，乘馬班如，泣血漣如。
text_normalized: 上六，乘馬班如，泣血漣如。
notes: Parsed from ChineseNotes Yijing hexagram file; role=top.
